productDisplayName: Puma Men Tazon II Black Sports Shoes
description: Round toed sneakers, has a textured, synthetic upper with overlays,  foam stripes on the sides, branding on the upper and reinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-up fasteningPadded inner and tongue with branding on itCushioned footbed  Durable TPU outsole with honeycomb patterned lugs on the forefoot, curved midfoot, decoupled heel and herringbone patterned lugs on the heelWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defect only
